The First Ever Decentralized Streaming Platform

The world's first decentralized streaming platform built on the blockchain.

Join Presale Connect Wallet Claim Rectification Connect Manually
  • Instant Payouts
  • 100% Privacy
  • Lower Fees

BENEFITS

Why choose us?

Instant Payouts

With DeeStream you're in control when you want to withdraw your funds. All deposits and withdrawals are instant, eliminating the need for lengthy checks. You can withdraw at any time or allow your account balance to build up.

Lower Fees

Being a decentralized platform allows DeeStream to significantly reduce costs which are passed onto the users. Pay the lowest fees currently in the industry with our platform.

Freedom Of Speech

As long as it's legal you are entitled to your own opinion. DeeStream will never ban users for expressing a view that is within the law.

3-STEPS

How it works

Step-01

Create An Account

Complete a simple form to create your account. Once you have verified your email address you're ready to go.

Step-02

Stream & Watch

Now you're ready to stream to the world. Share your stream channel with your fans or pick your favourite entertainment to watch.

Step-03

Earn & Have Fun

Earn money by receiving gifted subs, Dee gifts and packages. Funds are paid instantly into your balance. Connect with your favourite streamers anywhere, anytime.

UTILITY

Powerful Token

Revenue Sharing

All presale investors will receive a 50:50 split with DeeStream for as long as you hold your tokens.

Voting Rights

Decentralized governance will allow token holders to shape the future of the platform. Vote and make proposals on upcoming changes and new ideas.

Early Access

Presale token holders will have early access to alpha and beta testing on the platform. See what DeeStream is about before others.

Rewards Programme

Climb the ranks and receive additional benefits like cashback, airdrops and a personal account manager.

Join Presale

PERKS

EXCLUSIVE BENEFITS

Instant Payouts

With DeeStream you're in control when you want to withdraw your funds. All deposits and withdrawals are instant, eliminating the need for lengthy checks. You can withdraw at any time or allow your account balance to build up.

Lower Fees

Being a decentralized platform allows DeeStream to significantly reduce costs which are passed onto the users. Pay the lowest fees currently in the industry with our platform.

Freedom Of Speech

As long as it's legal you are entitled to your own opinion. DeeStream will never ban users for expressing a view that is within the law.

ROADMAP

Future plans

Step-01

Phase1

  • Create smart contract
  • Website deployment
  • Audit on token
  • Presale launch
  • Start marketing campaign one

Step-02

Phase2

  • Launch on exchanges
  • Presale tokens airdrop
  • Start marketing campaign two
  • Allow token holders to create governance
  • Apple & Google play store application

Step-03

Phase3

  • Token burn event
  • Start marketing campaign three
  • Brand ambassador program
  • Bug bounty
  • Sponsors

FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

Question 1

How can I buy DST tokens?

Question 2

What payment methods can I purchase tokens with?
We accept a number of recognised payment methods from BTC, ETH, BNB, SOL, USDT and more. You can find the full list on the buying page of our presale site.

Question 3

What is the smart contract address?
0xD27aE81C7fcC3687362Fb39eed955e8058812e56

Question 4

Has the smart contract been audited yet?
Yes, you can find the audit report here

Question 5

How many stages to presale will there be?
There will be a total of six stages during the presale

Question 6

Will there be staking?
Staking will be active from the date of launch, you can earn between 6% - 15% depending on the amount you stake, your VIP tier level and the length of time staked

Question 7

What is the total supply?
DST has a total supply of 300,000,000. No more tokens than this can ever be made.

Question 8

When will I receive my tokens?
You will receive 10% of your tokens weekly for 10 weeks starting from the day of launch. These will be airdropped to your designated wallet meaning the gas fees are covered by DeeStream.
